x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: High alert volume degrades Now Assist event correlation by overwhelming the signal-to-noise ratio. Now Assist AI groups and prioritizes alerts -- excessive volume reduces the quality of AI grouping recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Tune alert thresholds and filtering rules to reduce false-positive volume. Review alert management rules via em_alert_rule_list.do. Enable alert suppression for maintenance windows. High alert volume degrades Now Assist ITOM event correlation accuracy.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4b
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[High alert volume degrades Now Assist event correlation by overwhelming the signal-to-noise ratio. Now Assist AI groups and prioritizes alerts -- excessive volume reduces the quality of AI grouping recommendations.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Alert Volume and Noise Ratio</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-30);

    var ga = new GlideAggregate('em_alert');
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' alerts in last 30 days';

    if (count === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No alerts in the last 30 days. Alert volume and noise ratio cannot be assessed — Event Management may not be in use.'
        };
    } else if (count < 10000) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' alerts in the last 30 days. Alert volume is within a manageable range for Now Assist ITOM event correlation accuracy.'
        };
    } else if (count < 50000) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' alerts in the last 30 days. High alert volume may degrade Now Assist ITOM event correlation accuracy — review alert tuning.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' alerts in the last 30 days. Extreme alert noise will overwhelm Now Assist ITOM event correlation and significantly degrade AI grouping accuracy.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>ITOM</module>
<number>CHK0005985</number>
<order>60</order>
<remediation_guidance>Tune alert thresholds and filtering rules to reduce false-positive volume. Review alert management rules via em_alert_rule_list.do. Enable alert suppression for maintenance windows. High alert volume degrades Now Assist ITOM event correlation accuracy.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>4203a33acfd903108935fb251d851c4b</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
